creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Empty PR, send patches. 

A good amount of ports don't respect CFLAGS, CC, and things of the like. 
As much as I wish that wasn't the case, there are too many that a quick 
"this one doesn't" is going to help. 

Angry responses about committers who don't care will be cheerfully ignored.
